summary_ja: 2026-06-09 raw-backlog-ingestバッチ（5記事）。全記事が既存wikiページで完全にカバー済み。MAI-Thinking-1レポートは227行のconceptページ+関連ページ群、Hands-On Modern RLは本日作成のconceptページ、Dwarkesh AGI Economicsはagi-economics概念ページ+dwarkesh-patelエンティティページ、Ed Zitron ROI記事はed-zitronエンティティページに専用セクション、Paul Graham Being Popularはpaulgraham-comエンティティページ。全件skip、アクションなし。

decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ 既存ページで完全にカバー済み。concepts/mai-thinking-1-tech-report.md（227行）、concepts/microsoft-mai-models.md、entities/simon-willison.md、entities/elie-bakouch.mdが既に本記事の全内容（MoEアーキテクチャ、35B/1Tパラメータ、GRPO改良、30Tトークン前学習、ベンチマーク結果）を網羅。
decisions.body_excerpt: MAI-Thinking-1: Building a Hill-Climbing Machine. 109-page Microsoft AI technical report. 35B active / 1T total parameter MoE reasoning model. Zero synthetic data, zero distillation. 30T pre-training tokens from clean enterprise-grade data. 52.8% SWE-Bench Pro, 97.0% AIME 2025, 87.7% LiveCodeBench v6. Three specialist models: STEM reasoning, agentic coding, helpfulness/safety.

decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ 既存ページで完全にカバー済み。concepts/hands-on-modern-rl.md（156行、本日作成）が本記事の全内容（RLHF/DPO/GRPO/RLVR/Agentic RLのハンズオンカリキュラム）を網羅。sourcesにraw/articleパスも含まれる。
decisions.body_excerpt: Hands-On Modern RL: A Practice-First Guide. Open-source curriculum bridging classic RL to LLM post-training, RLVR, multimodal agents. PPO/DPO/GRPO implementations, training metric visualization, Agentic RL experiments.

decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ 既存ページで完全にカバー済み。concepts/agi-economics.md（93行、2026-06-05作成）がImas/Trammell対談の全内容（Relational Sector、capital satiation、O-ring理論、Pessimistic Moore's Law、Man-Not-Horse principle）を網羅。entities/dwarkesh-patel.mdにも参照済み。archive_status: already_archived。
decisions.body_excerpt: Alex Imas (Google DeepMind AGI Economics Director, U Chicago) and Phil Trammell (Epoch Head of Economics, Stanford) on Dwarkesh Podcast. Topics: capital share post-AGI, messy middle scenario, UBI vs Universal Basic Capital, relational sector, Jevons Paradox, O-ring automation theory.

decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ 既存エンティティページで完全にカバー済み。entities/ed-zitron.mdに「AI Doesn't Have ROI — Enterprise Cost Crisis (June 2026)」専用セクションがあり、Uber/Amazon/Walmartの事例、GitHub Copilotトークン課金移行、Bain ROIサーベイ、kalopsia thesisを網羅。sourcesにもraw/articleパス登録済み。archive_status: already_archived。
decisions.body_excerpt: Ed Zitron: AI Doesn't Have ROI. Enterprise token billing chaos, GitHub Copilot moved to token-based pricing, users burning thousands on $39/mo subscription. Uber burned entire annual token budget in 4 months. Nobody can measure AI ROI or cost per task.

decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ 既存エンティティページで完全にカバー済み。entities/paulgraham-com.mdに「Programming Language Popularity Theory (May 2001)」セクションがあり、Being Popularエッセイの全内容（Expert Hackers as Driver, Hacker's Idea of Good Language, Language Design for Hackers, Popular Language as a Moving Target, The Blub Paradox）を網羅。sourcesにもraw/articleパス登録済み。archive_status: already_archived。
decisions.body_excerpt: Paul Graham: Being Popular (May 2001). Programming languages are tools for hackers. Expert hackers drive language adoption. Popular languages get feedback which drives improvement. The Blub paradox: programmers are satisfied with whatever language they know.
